message:
refactor(web): use bracket notation for process.env access

Change process.env property access to bracket notation throughout:
- process.env.CI → process.env["CI"]
- process.env.E2E_BASE_URL → process.env["E2E_BASE_URL"]
- process.env.E2E_NO_SERVER → process.env["E2E_NO_SERVER"]

Also refactor conditional webServer config to use spread operator
instead of ternary with undefined, making the object structure cleaner.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,13 +11,13 @@ export default defineConfig({
   testMatch: "**/*.e2e.ts",
   outputDir: "./e2e-results",
   fullyParallel: true,
-  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
-  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
-  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  forbidOnly: !!process.env["CI"],
+  retries: process.env["CI"] ? 2 : 0,
+  ...(process.env["CI"] ? { workers: 1 } : {}),
   reporter: [["list"], ["html", { outputFolder: "e2e-report" }]],
 
   use: {
-    baseURL: process.env.E2E_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:5173",
+    baseURL: process.env["E2E_BASE_URL"] || "http://localhost:5173",
     screenshot: "only-on-failure",
     video: "retain-on-failure",
     trace: "retain-on-failure",
@@ -30,12 +30,14 @@ export default defineConfig({
     },
   ],
 
-  webServer: process.env.E2E_NO_SERVER
-    ? undefined
+  ...(process.env["E2E_NO_SERVER"]
+    ? {}
     : {
-        command: "bun run dev",
-        url: "http://localhost:5173",
-        reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
-        timeout: 30000,
-      },
+        webServer: {
+          command: "bun run dev",
+          url: "http://localhost:5173",
+          reuseExistingServer: !process.env["CI"],
+          timeout: 30000,
+        },
+      }),
 });
